reason: Backend quality checklist entry point for final review.
Check WebSocket handshake auth, token secrecy, and product-member authorization behavior.
Check snapshot member state/order and join/leave lifecycle consistency.
Check public error status/code/message mapping and envelopes.
Check no tokens, secrets, sensitive bodies, or audio data are logged or committed.
Check message contract and projection consistency across layers.
Check implementation against the researched Issue #15 scope and evidence anchors.
